fields.name: No known medical conditions
fields.description: Pet has no recorded medical conditions.

fields.name: Diabetes Mellitus
fields.description: Chronic condition affecting blood sugar regulation.

fields.name: Chronic Kidney Disease
fields.description: Gradual loss of kidney function over time.

fields.name: Food Allergy
fields.description: Adverse immune response to specific dietary components.

fields.name: Atopy (Environmental Allergy)
fields.description: Allergic reaction to environmental allergens like pollen or dust mites.

fields.name: Arthritis
fields.description: Inflammation of one or more joints, causing pain and stiffness.

fields.name: FIV Positive
fields.description: Feline Immunodeficiency Virus; affects the immune system.

fields.name: Heart Murmur
fields.description: Abnormal sound during a heartbeat cycle.
